name: The Perfect Matcha Latte
intro: You can make the perfect matcha latte at home with a blender; you’ll get a delicious, fluffy foam. Try it—I know you’ll like it! For best results, use the white almond butter, or replace it with unsalted cashew butter. You can use almond mylk or other vegetable-based milk, but then you should omit the nut butter and the water.
method: Put the matcha powder, honey, and almond butter in the blender. Add water, and mix.
